requirements.static-vs-dynamic-latency-o3-vs-o2-opt30: Table 11 reports that for OPT-30B at sequence length 256, SmoothQuant-O3 has latency 227.6ms and SmoothQuant-O2 has latency 240.2ms, confirming O3 is faster than O2.
requirements.static-vs-dynamic-latency-o2-vs-o1-opt30: Table 11 reports that for OPT-30B at sequence length 256, SmoothQuant-O2 has latency 240.2ms and SmoothQuant-O1 has latency 246.7ms, confirming O2 is faster than O1.
requirements.table11-opt30b-seq256-latencies: For OPT-30B at sequence length 256, Table 11 reports SmoothQuant-O3 latency of 227.6ms, SmoothQuant-O2 latency of 240.2ms, and SmoothQuant-O1 latency of 246.7ms.
